message:
feat(timing): Add compilation time tracking and metrics

Add comprehensive timing infrastructure for measuring remote compilation:

- CompilationTimingBreakdown: Tracks rsync_up, remote_build, rsync_down, total
- CompilationMetrics: Full metrics with speedup calculation
- CompilationTimer: RAII-style phase tracking with tracing logs
- MetricsAggregator: Statistics with p50/p95/p99 percentiles, success rate

All types are serializable and exported from rch-common.
Includes 14 unit tests covering all functionality.

Closes: remote_compilation_helper-hft

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
